  ],
};

const graph = new Graph({
  container: 'container',
  data,
  node: {
    style: {
      labelText: (d) => d.label,
      size: (d) => d.size,
      lineWidth: 1,
    },
  },
  edge: { style: { labelText: (d) => d.label } },
  behaviors: [

    'drag-canvas',
    {

      enable: (event) => event.data.scale < 1,
      state: 'selected',
      reset: true,
    },
    { type: 'click-select', key: 'click-select', multiple: true },
  ],
  autoFit: 'center',
});

graph.render();
